titleStmt.title: SII 24.125: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 125. (A.R. No. 68 of 1936-37.) IV PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Records the gift of a golden lamp-stand set with one ruby and an endowment of money for maintaining the lamp and for the supply of camphor, by Kōdai Ravivarmaṉ of Vēṇāḍu in Malai-nāḍu. The details of date, viz., 11th year, Vṛiśchika, śu. 5, Monday, Tiruvōṇam regularly correspond to A.D. 1156, November 19, Monday, ·63; ·58.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmaruviya tirumātum puvimātu jeyamātum nāmaruviya kalaimātum pukaḻmātu nayantu pulka Arumaṟai vitineṟi Aṉaittun taḻaippa varumuṟai Urimai yaṇimuṭicūṭit tiṅkaḷ veṇkuṭait ticaik kaḷiṟeṭṭun taṅku taṉikkūṭan
tāṉeṉa viḷaṅkap porukalip paṭṭikaic ceṅkol turappa voru katirāḻi puvi yaḷantuṭaṉvara villavar yiraṭṭar minavar ciṅkaḷar pallavar nutaliyar pāttivar paṇiya Eṇṇaruṅ kaṟpil maṇṇakam puṇarntu cempoṉ
vīrasiṅṅāsaṉattup puvaṉimuḻutuṭaiyara(ḷ)ḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecari paṟmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrāja rājatevarkku yāṇṭu patiṉonṟāvatu miriccika nāyaṟṟu pūrva
pakṣattup pañcamiyum tiṅkaḷ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattiṉ nāḷ tiru varaṅkam periya koyilil tiruvaṭi vaḷavañ ceykiṟa tiruvaraṅkatāsarum tiruppatiyil śrīvaiyiṣṇavarkaḷil pacalaip peri
ya koyil tāsarum kantāṭait tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇa nampiyum kuravaicerit tiruvaraṅkavaḷḷalārum śrīvaiṣṇava vāriyañ ceykiṟa nālūṟ ciṅkappirā nampiyum vaṅkippuṟattu tiruvāykkulattu Āḻvāṉum viranārāya
vaṇṭuvarāpati ta vaṭamaturaip piṟantāṉu ci paṇ ṭārakkāriyam tiruvaraṅkattu sabhaiyāril kevuṇṇiyaṉ tiruvaraṅkatevan Āḻkkoṇṭavilli paṭṭanum pāratāyan kecavaṉ puruṣottama paṭṭanum poṟ paṇṭārikaḷ pāra
tāyan tiruveṅkaṭavan Ananta nārāyaṇaṇum pāratā ṅkala cirāmannum śrī pākavata ṇṭārikaḷ ṟavūr ca ḷḷaṟ kiramavitta num kaṅkāṇi ceyvārkaḷil Arayan parāṅkuca nampiyum Āḻvān num koyiṟ kaṇakku tiruvaraṅkappiriyannum Āka
ivvaṉaivom malaināṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu Aṭikaḷil śrī cikotai Iravipaṉman varak kāṭṭiṉa talaiyil Oru māṇikkam muttiṉ poṉṉil tirukkutti viḷakku Onṟu Itu Emperumāṉār Aruḷic ceyalpaṭiye kaikkoṇṭu Ittirunan
ḻakiyamaṇavāḷapperumāḷ tirumuṉpey tirununtāviḷakku Eriyak kaṭavatāka Ittiruviḷakku Eriyu(m)miṭattu tiruvaraṅka tevanāl nāḷ Onṟukku naṟuney nāḻiyāka nāḷ munnūṟṟu Aṟupattu Añcāka ney munnūṟṟu Aṟu pattaiyñ ñāḻiyum nāḷ Onṟukku kaṟpūram Iraṇ
ṭi Āka nāḷ munṉūṟṟu Aṟupattu Añcukkuk kaṟpūram muppattaṟu kaḻañ caraiyum Ippaṭi santrātittavaṟ cellak kaṭavatākavum . Itu cellumiṭattu ṉāṭṭile nilaṅkoṇṭu viṭumiṭattu nilaṅkaḷukku Aḻivu vanta potu Itu cellāte Oḻiyumeṉṟum śrī cipaṇṭārat
te poṉṉāka Oṭukki ṉāl viruttiyāle celvatākavum pāttu tiruvaraṅkatevaṉāl naṟuney nāḻikkum kaṟpūram Iraṇṭu mañcāṭikkum kācu Oṉṟukku tiruvaraṅkatevaṉāl ney Eṇṇāḻi Ākavum kācu Oṉṟukkuk kaṟpūram Araik kaḻaiñcākavum Orāṇṭu nāḷ muṉṉūṟṟaṟupa
ttu Añcukku veṇṭuṅ kācu 6 100 3 10 3 Aṟunūṟṟu muppattu muṉṟum kācu Oṉpatekālukku Accu Oṉṟāka Accu 6 10 8(1/4)vum Aṟupattu Eṭṭekāle Araik kālum śrī paṇṭāratte Ikkotai Iravipaṉmaṉukkāka Ippoṉṉiṉ tiruk kuttiviḷakkum Ivvaccum koṭu van
ta patuvāy Anan=tanārāyaṇanum coḻama vivā t tiruvaraṅka tāsanum Iraṇaciṅka maṇavāḷanum Uḷḷiruppuk kaṇṭaṉ Iraviyum Aḻakiya maṇa vāḷapperumāḷ tiruppaḷḷit toṅkaluṭaiyārkaḷil ci kulacekarap pirammārāyanum Aṇiyaraṅkap pirammārāyanum Ivvaṉaivaraiyum ko
ṇṭu Ittiruppatiyil muṉpu mamum Emperumāṉār Aruḷic ceyalppaṭiye Ippon śrīpaṇṭāratte Oṭukkivittuk koṇṭu viruttiyāle canti rātittavaṟ Ittiruviḷakkuc cellakkaṭavatāka naṭuviṟ tirumatiḷil nāṭaṟi pukaḻan tiruvācalile
meṟkaṭaiya kalveṭṭivittom Ivvaṉaivom . Itu śrī vaiṣṇava rakṣaiPublished in Ep. Ind., vol. XXXIII, pp. 159-62..
Digital edition of SII 24.125 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
